name: Peanut Butter Pie II
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the cream cheese in a mixer bowl until light.
2. Blend in the peanut butter and powdered sugar.
3. Add milk, gradually, beating constantly.
4. Fold in the whipped topping.
5. Spoon into the pie shell.
6. Garnish with chopped peanuts if desired.
7. Freeze until firm. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
